subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablí-'Alí! Thy letter hath reached Us, and thy call hath been honored with the grace of Our hearing. On this day every soul must exalt God, glorified be His majesty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل علی کتابت رسید و ندایت بشرف اصغا فائز امروز هر نفسی حق جل جلاله را
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as sun, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @thankfulness; gratitude
